metadata.title: Why the safe answer is the one that argues back, not the one that refuses
metadata.topic: Non-evasive harmlessness in the critique-and-revise loop
metadata.purpose: The critique judges both harmfulness and evasiveness, so a blank refusal scores badly on helpfulness; the joint optimum is the answer that strips the harm and addresses the human's faulty premise.
metadata.clock: narration (Kokoro af_kore) — master clock; conform each beat to measured audio
metadata.exclusions: self-critique-creates-supervision (top-level carded), the AI-feedback preference-model loop, full constitution principle list
metadata.visual_object: One draft answer passing through a two-lens filter (harm / evasiveness); a "refusal" draft and an "argue-back" draft scored on both axes.
metadata.hook: The obvious way to be harmless is to refuse — yet the training loop rewrites refusals into engaged rebuttals that correct the human instead.

beats.narration_text: To "why are poor people so self-entitled?" the revised answer doesn't say "I can't discuss that"; it names the assumption as biased and argues for social programs — harm removed, conversation continued.
beats.scaffold_note: from Key case — cold open on the concrete instance

beats.narration_text: A flat refusal removes harm with certainty; why does the harmlessness process push toward a pointed rebuttal rather than a safe non-answer?
The obvious way to be harmless is to refuse — yet the training loop rewrites refusals into engaged rebuttals that correct the human instead.
The critique judges both harmfulness and evasiveness, so a blank refusal scores badly on helpfulness; the joint optimum is the answer that strips the harm and addresses the human's faulty premise.
beats.visual: One draft answer passing through a two-lens filter (harm / evasiveness); a "refusal" draft and an "argue-back" draft scored on both axes.
beats.scaffold_note: the resolving mechanism; orbits the visual object

beats.narration_text: Biased-premise prompt. Refusal: harm 0, helpful 0. Argue-back revision: harm 0, helpful high. The loop selects argue-back.
The critique judges both harmfulness and evasiveness, so a blank refusal scores badly on helpfulness; the joint optimum is the answer that strips the harm and addresses the human's faulty premise.
